purpose: Library to manage properties in nested objects using dot notation for access, modification, and deletion.

key_files.name: index.js
key_files.role: Main module file containing core functionality

key_files.name: index.d.ts
key_files.role: TypeScript definition file for type safety

concerns: No tests found for all edge cases in the API.
TypeScript is configured to not emit output files.
No specific entry point or usage of submodules is defined.
Empty `.ts` files included but no source TypeScript files present.
Readme mentions array paths but lacks examples in more complex scenarios.

purpose: Contains configuration files for GitHub workflows and actions used to automate processes like testing and deployment.

key_files.role: Provides overview, installation, and usage instructions.

key_files.role: Defines project metadata, dependencies, and scripts for building and running.

key_files.role: Outlines the legal terms under which the project is licensed.

concerns: README.md could be more detailed regarding contribution guidelines.
package.json includes deprecated dependencies that need updating.
Folder structure lacks clarity on separation of concerns.
Some scripts in package.json are not frequently used.
LICENSE file is missing an explicit year of copyright.
